calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petiton For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Continued To May-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Srijana Dhakhwa for petitioner Dennis Nathan Watts (via Zoom).

Ms. Dhakhwa reported that petitioner had submitted a declaration addressing the decedent's anticipated liabilities, which were believed to be minimal.

The Court continued the matter to May 5, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
